DRACONIS COMBINE The Draconis Combine, located coreward-spinward of Terra_ ruled by the Kurita family: Its culture parallels that of ancient Japan_ emphasizing personal honor and martia ability. The offi- language of the Combine Japanese, though English is widely spoken: Staunchly militaristic_ the Combine has repeatedly clashed with its neighbors, though it reached a understanding with the Federated Commonwealth during the Clan invasion that allowed each nation t0 concentrate n battling the invaders _ In the first years of the Clan invasion_ the Combine lost (arge swaths of ter ritory to Clans Ghost Bear; Nova Cat ad Smoke Jaguar As part of the reborn Star League, nelped crush tne Jaguars and absorbed the Nova Cats. Recently; Coordinator Theodore Kurita appears have   normalized relations with the Ghost Bear Dominion.
relies heavily on imported goods_ its inhabitants fear blockade more than invasion: The House of Government on Atreus is the only capitol building the Successor States still standing on its original site tne others have all been relocated destroyed.
Andurlen Andurien study in contrasts. Currently ruled by the Humphreys family; descendants of those who helped forge the Free Worlds League the planet is known throughout the League for its beautiful botanical gardens which stretch north of the capital city of Jojoken; The gardens beauty belies the planet 's tumultuous history: and neighboring worilds seceded from the League 3030 and joined the Magistracy of Canopus in war against the Capellan Confederation: decade -long struggle ensued before Andurien and its sister worlds were finally paci: fied and restored to the Free Worlds League
Luthien The Combine capital world heavily industrialized, Its Iand: scape dominated by ugly sprawling cities: Much 0t Its air and water is contaminated, earning the nickname ~Black Luthien. The planetary capital of Imperial City is stark exception t0 this rule Its classical Japanese architecture rich with teak and mar: ble and surrounded by verdant parks makes one of the most breathtaking cities in the Inner Sphere Clan attacks devastat- ed large areas around Imperial City, but considerable effort has since been made rebuild
CAPELLAN CONFEDERATION The smallest the Successor States_ the Capellan Confederation occupies sliver of space directly rimward of Terra Over the years it has lost many of its worlds other nations, The current Chancellon Sun-Tzu Liao, nas spent nis reign attempuing t0 retake those lost planets and IS currently locked in bitter struggle to recapture the independent St. Ives Compact: The official language of the Capellan Confederation is Mandarin though English widely spoken:
Sian The Capellan capital is famed for its vast Oak, pine and bamboo forests_ in which leopards and giant pandas roam: The early colonists introduced most of the planet' wildlife and care fully  nurtured its ecosystem resemble Terra' Asian conti" nent, home of the Liao family that became Sian'$ rulers_ In the centuries since colonization; however; increasingly profitable mining operations have devastated many wilderness areas. The Chancellor'5 summer palace lies at the southern end of the Wunan continent and nas been closely guarded ever since Federated Suns forces raided the world 3029_
Al Na'Ir The Al Na'ir system has not yet developed habitable plan: but its mineral-rich asteroid fields have encouraged the Combine to establish asteroid colonies and construct space stations Luthien Armor Works operates an orbital BattleMech factory the system; detended by numerous Wcadons plat- forms. Navigation in Na'ir iS difficult and dangerous even tor experienced pilots_
FREE WORLDS LEAGUE Historically: the Free Worlds League has been most fractious of the Successor States, federation petty fief doms located rimward-antispinward Terra. The officiab Ian- guage of  the Free Worlds   League English, though many regions use other languages Thomas Marik; who became Captain General in 3036, nas centralized power an unprecedented degree and made the League one of the Inner Sphere' richest nations However, the League' economic success conceals its political fragility. Many League politicians find Marik"  dealings with the Word of Blake highly suspect, and more than few have voiced Opposition to Marik' rule
St. Ives Best known for its electronics industry, the largest in the Confederation _ wves became tne capital of the Ives Compact after the Compact worlds seceded from the Confederation in 3030, Ives rejoined the Confederation in 3062 , after major military engagement forced Duchess Candace Liao t0 withdraw from the world_ The planetary capital Tiantan bears  numerous scars   from that   struegle, whicn included the use 01 nerve gas by  Capellan  extremists_ Life across the planet is slowly returning to normal, though tensions remain high.
Atreus capital worid Atreus surprisingly undeveloped_ with the exception of fishing and aerospace manufacture_ the plan- et'5 most prominent industry is government: Because Atreus
